channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: England beat Mexico to reach World Cup quarterfinals
item.description: MEXICO CITY,- England’s national football team defeated Mexico 3-2 in a round-of-16 match at the 2026 FIFA World Cup in Mexico City. England’s goals were scored by Jude Bellingham in the 36th and 38th minutes and Harry Kane in the 60th minute from the penalty spot. Mexico’s goals came from Julian Quinones in the 42nd [...] The post England beat Mexico to reach World Cup quarterfinals appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Nationwide blackout plunges Zimbabwe into darkness as ZESA scrambles to restore power @ZESAOfficial
item.description: Zimbabwe was plunged into darkness on Monday evening after a technical fault on the national electricity grid triggered a nationwide power outage. Power utility ZESA Holdings said the blackout occurred at 6:24pm, affecting the entire country. “ZESA Holdings wishes to inform its valued stakeholders of a nationwide power outage that occurred today, Monday 6 July [...] The post Nationwide blackout plunges Zimbabwe into darkness as ZESA scrambles to restore power appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Has South Africa forgotten Steve Biko? The inferiority complex behind rising Afrophobia @nehandaradio
item.description: Drawing on childhood memories of Zimbabwe hosting liberation refugees, Takura Zhangazha argues that today’s anti-African sentiment in South Africa contradicts the values of Steve Biko, Nelson Mandela and the continent’s liberation struggle. The post Has South Africa forgotten Steve Biko? The inferiority complex behind rising Afrophobia appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Warriors Defender Lunga Escapes Unhurt After Gun Attack in Johannesburg @263Chat
item.description: Zimbabwe international and Mamelodi Sundowns defender Divine Lunga escaped unharmed after gunmen opened fire on his vehicle in Johannesburg prompting South African police to launch an attempted murder investigation. The 30-year-old defender was driving a blue BMW along Tudhope Street in Hillbrow on Sunday with [...] The post Warriors Defender Lunga Escapes Unhurt After Gun Attack in Johannesburg appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Makhadzi urges African unity as Zimbabweans call for boycott of South African artists @nehandaradio
item.description: Makhadzi has appealed for African unity after Zimbabweans called for a boycott of South African artists amid rising tensions over Afrophobia and anti-immigrant violence. The post Makhadzi urges African unity as Zimbabweans call for boycott of South African artists appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Prevail Group Steps In to Employ Zimbabweans Deported from South Africa @263Chat
item.description: Prevail Group of Companies, owned by presidential investment advisor Paul Tungwarara, has launched a formal employment initiative targeting Zimbabwean nationals recently deported from South Africa, offering positions on an upcoming construction project for skilled returnees. The company notice, issued from its Borrowdale headquarters, invites applications [...] The post Prevail Group Steps In to Employ Zimbabweans Deported from South Africa appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Lifeline For Deported Zimbabweans As Prevail Group Offers Job Opportunities
item.description: By A Correspondent| Prevail Group of Companies, owned by presidential investment advisor Paul Tungwarara, has launched a formal employment initiative... Continue reading "Lifeline For Deported Zimbabweans As Prevail Group Offers Job Opportunities" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: India’s squad announced for T20I Tour of Zimbabwe 2026 @3menonaboat
item.description:
The team features a strong mix of experienced players and promising young talents.

The post India’s squad announced for T20I Tour of Zimbabwe 2026 first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: Rising Municipal Costs Threaten Bulawayo’s Industrial Competitiveness, Business Leaders Warn
item.description: BULAWAYO – Zimbabwe’s manufacturing capital risks accelerating industrial decline unless municipal taxation, infrastructure constraints and the cost of doing business are urgently addressed, business leaders have warned, drawing parallels with the decline of some of the world’s once-dominant industrial cities. An extensive report compiled by the Bulawayo Chapter of the Zimbabwe National Chamber of Commerce [...] The post Rising Municipal Costs Threaten Bulawayo’s Industrial Competitiveness, Business Leaders Warn appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: South Africa deploys troops to bolster security during anti-migrant protests
item.description: JOHANNESBURG,- South Africa has deployed more than 3,000 soldiers nationwide to bolster security and support police this month during anti-migrant protests ​that organisers have vowed to hold every week, a letter ‌signed by the president showed on Friday. Protesters marched across cities on Tuesday, with some demonstrations hit by violence, and an anti-migrant movement says [...] The post South Africa deploys troops to bolster security during anti-migrant protests appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Hybrid Seed Leading Revival of Cotton Farming in Zimbabwe @263Chat
item.description: A new generation of hybrid cotton seeds is giving Zimbabwean farmers fresh reason for optimism. Developed to deliver higher yields and withstand climate shocks and pests, the seeds are helping to boost productivity and improve livelihoods in farming communities. By Elia Ntali, bird story agency [...] The post Hybrid Seed Leading Revival of Cotton Farming in Zimbabwe appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Malawian National Dies on Repatriation Bus En Route to Beitbridge Border Post
item.description: Malawian National Dies on Repatriation Bus En Route to Beitbridge Border Post A Malawian national has died after suddenly falling ill while being transported on a repatriation bus from the Musina Temporary Repatriation Centre in Limpopo. The man was among undocumented foreign nationals being transported for repatriation when he reportedly became ill during the journey [...] The post Malawian National Dies on Repatriation Bus En Route to Beitbridge Border Post appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: We Are Worried About Uncertain Future, Two Siblings Declare As They Return To Zim From SA
item.description: By A Correspondent| Two undocumented Zimbabwean siblings who were born and grew up in South Africa say they are deeply... Continue reading "We Are Worried About Uncertain Future, Two Siblings Declare As They Return To Zim From SA" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Mining Firm’s CSR Delivers Modern School for Shamva @263Chat
item.description: A gold mining company operating in Shamva has transformed access to education for hundreds of children after investing in the construction and expansion of Zvitokwe Primary School in a corporate social responsibility (CSR) initiative that community leaders say has significantly improved teaching and learning. Canterbury [...] The post Mining Firm’s CSR Delivers Modern School for Shamva appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: NetOne Launches ‘Freedom Bundles’ to Boost Affordable Connectivity Across Zimbabwe @263Chat @NetOneCellular
item.description: State-owned mobile network operator NetOne has unveiled a new range of “Freedom Bundles” expanding its prepaid offerings with voice, SMS and data packages as it seeks to improve affordable access to digital communication across Zimbabwe. The new bundles replace the company’s long-running Khuluma 24/7 package [...] The post NetOne Launches ‘Freedom Bundles’ to Boost Affordable Connectivity Across Zimbabwe appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat
